content:
#### La Función Actual

```sql
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_admin()
RETURNS boolean
LANGUAGE plpgsql
SECURITY DEFINER
SET search_path = public
AS $$
BEGIN
  RETURN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM public.profiles
    WHERE id = auth.uid()
    AND role::text IN ('admin', 'superadmin')
  );
END;
$$;
```
